default.objective: • Find and clear the two graves: "Tomb of the Consort" and "Mausoleum of the Praetor".
default.layout: • Two graves need to be located. • The locations of the graves are random, but one is likely to be generated along the same wall as the "Memorial Gate" (the next boss area). • Otherwise, they tend to form along the walls of the structure. • Two tombs are also adorned with patterns that run along the walls on each side. The recommended approach is to first look along the same wall as the memorial site.. Once you find a grave, it's usually located either near it or along the opposite wall. • There is a guaranteed way to obtain the "Sarcophagus" item, which has a high chance of appearing on the wall opposite the "waypoint" (presumably, a specific location or area).There is a chance of obtaining a ring made of iron (which adds flat damage), and it is a powerful item.If you're targeting a specific company, pursue it actively.Should.
default.tips: •The order in which to clear "Tomb of the Consort" and "Mausoleum of the Praetor" is as follows: First, enter "Mausoleum of the Praetor" once, then immediately exit, and then proceed to "Tomb of the Consort". This will raise the level of "Tomb of the Consort" to level 9.. • This approach improves experience efficiency and also allows players to obtain items with a level 11 base, which are +2 levels higher, from the boss in area level 9. This increases the opportunities for equipment upgrades. Note: As an example, the "Guardian's Bow" is based on level 11.If you don't do this, you'll only be able to obtain Level 5 bows.However, items like crossbows, spears, and talismans that start at level 10 (such as sturdy crossbows, hunting spears, and talismans made of ash) are the next level to upgrade, so from a purely equipment-focused perspective, you don't need to use them.The best approach is to use the weapons you prefer, but since the experience points are so generous, the conclusion is that it's beneficial to do them regardless.
default.summary: • Find and clear the two graves: "Tomb of the Consort" and "Mausoleum of the Praetor". The recommended approach is to first look along the same wall as the memorial site. Opening the "Sarcophagus" will reward you with a ring.It has a high probability of appearing on the opposite wall of the waypoint.A ring made of iron (with added flat damage) has been dropped.It is possible to do. The order in which to clear "Tomb of the Consort" and "Mausoleum of the Praetor" is as follows: First, enter "Mausoleum of the Praetor" once, then immediately exit, and then proceed to "Tomb of the Consort". This will increase the level of "Tomb of the Consort" to level 9. As a result, the efficiency of gaining experience is improved, and the boss in area level 9 drops items that are level 11 based, which increases the opportunities for equipment upgrades.

And, furthermore,Focus on the following two aspects of the distinctive "gate tile" shape:The action to be taken. ① Are the gate tiles located close to or far from the entrance of the area? ② In relation to the ship, is it parallel or perpendicular? Considering the above, we will divide the situation into the following four scenarios: (A through D correspond to the map images) A (The gate tile is close to the gate, and also parallel to the ship): After passing through the gate, you would then turn around and walk in the opposite direction. B (The gate tile is far away and also parallel to the ship): Once you find the gate, proceed by drawing a "V" shape. C (The gate tile is close to the gate, and also perpendicular to the ship): Once you pass through the gate, head towards the opposite direction of the ship and move deeper into the area. D (without a gate): However, this pattern differs in that it does not proceed along the ship's side wall in the initial phase. In that case, if you go to the opposite side of the ship, you will find "The Forgotten Cell."We will continue to move forward in a zigzag pattern.

default.tips: • Regarding tattoo earnings, it's best to aim for a moderate level.The reason is that elemental resistance is not particularly useful in the early game, as it can be easily added to equipment later, and there is little benefit to exceeding the maximum value in stats. However, its resistance to elements is also beneficial for progressing through the early stages of the map, and it can be particularly useful for hardcore and SSF players. [Boss Information] Yama the White Attributes: Physical, Chaotic Resistance: – Weaknesses: –
default.summary: • Complete all three challenges. • Gain a permanent buff. • Boss: "Defeat Yama the White" • Continuing further, we proceed to "Trial of the Ancestors". Regarding tattoo earnings, the skill level should be moderate.The reason is that elemental resistance is not particularly useful in the early game, as it can be easily added to equipment later, and there is little benefit to exceeding the maximum value in stats. However, its resistance to elements is not a disadvantage for progressing through the early stages of the map, and it is useful for hardcore and SSF, so it should be chosen based on your build. Additionally, it is possible to exchange tattoos one at a time, but you can also exchange them all at once at the end.(This allows for exchanging items at the next area, Navali)

default.layout: • In most cases, the boss room is located at the top of the area. •The recommended approach is:   –If you are instructed to proceed "left" or "up" from the starting point, you must always follow that direction.. If the map's structure forces you to go "right" from the starting point, Once you pass the next "T" junction, you will almost certainly proceed to the "left/up" direction. - In most layouts, the boss room is located above a square-shaped area. Therefore, the direction one would typically exit the diamond-shaped area is almost always the opposite of the direction from which it was entered. - If you enter the diamond-shaped area from the right → exit to the left/above - If you enter the diamond-shaped area from the left → exit to the right/up.
default.tips: The long conversation at the beginning of the boss fight can be skipped using the "respawn" function, starting from "checkpoint".(Simply proceed to the center of the boss room, and when the quest log appears at the bottom of the screen, you're good to go.) After the boss battle, proceed deeper into the area. When the screen is completely covered in bright light, the message "Talk to the person wearing a hood" will appear, and you can skip to the respawn point using checkpoint. [Boss Information] Benedictus, the first emissary of Utopia Attributes: Physical, Lightning Resistance: Lightning Weaknesses: –
default.summary: • "Defeat Benedictus, the first envoy of Utopia." • Progress through the quest in the deepest part of the area. • Return to the city using portal (City) I told Roadly to go to "Ngakanu" by boat. Generally, the boss room is located at the top of the area. ① If you can proceed either "left" or "up" from the starting point, you must proceed in the direction indicated. ② If, due to the map's structure, the player is forced to go "right" from the starting point, After passing the next "T" junction, proceed to the "left/up" direction. The long conversation at the beginning of the boss fight can be skipped using the "respawn" function, starting from "checkpoint".(Simply proceed to the center of the boss room, and when the quest log appears at the bottom of the screen, you're good to go.) After the boss battle, proceed deeper into the area. When the screen is completely covered in bright light, the message "Talk to the person wearing a hood" will appear, and you can skip to the respawn point using checkpoint.
